case_title: FLSICK, CHRISTOPHER vs. THE BARTH CORP DBA RICHARDSON FINE ART HANDLERS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLSICK, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT THE BARTH CORP DBA RICHARDSON FINE ART HANDLERS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLSICK, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE BARTH CORP DBA RICHARDSON FINE ART HANDLERS $320.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00
